title: neosasamorpha lasioderma
intro:
Neosasamorpha lasioderma, commonly known as Samorpha, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include relief from inflammation, pain, and fever. The health benefits of Samorpha are attributed to its therapeutic actions, such as anti-inflammatory, analgesic, and antipyretic properties. The bioactive constituents of Samorpha include flavonoids, terpenoids, and alkaloids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
